testcase.name: test_shutdown_joins_monitor_thread
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO src.data.quality.enhanced_quality_monitor_v2:enhanced_quality_monitor_v2.py:127 EnhancedQualityMonitorV2 initialized INFO src.data.quality.enhanced_quality_monitor_v2:enhanced_quality_monitor_v2.py:772 EnhancedQualityMonitorV2 shutdown --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_check_quality_trends_logs_warning
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO src.data.quality.enhanced_quality_monitor_v2:enhanced_quality_monitor_v2.py:127 EnhancedQualityMonitorV2 initialized WARNING src.data.quality.enhanced_quality_monitor_v2:enhanced_quality_monitor_v2.py:659 Quality trend decreasing for accuracy: 0.18 --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- INFO:src.data.quality.enhanced_quality_monitor_v2:EnhancedQualityMonitorV2 initialized WARNING:src.data.quality.enhanced_quality_monitor_v2:Quality trend decreasing for accuracy: 0.18
